title: Borrowed Leverage
hook_text: The rich don't use their own money
body_text: Leverage means using resources you don't own
voiceover_text: The rich don't use their own money, or their own time, or even their own audience. They use leverage, and leverage means putting resources you don't own to work for you. There are four kinds, and most people only ever use the worst one. Labor is borrowing other people's time. Capital is borrowing other people's money. Then there are the two that changed everything: media and code. Media is borrowing other people's attention, and it costs nothing to copy. Code is borrowing a machine that works while you sleep. You can record one video and a million people watch it. You can write one automation and it runs forever. These last two need no permission and no payroll. That's why a single person with a laptop can now compete with a company. Use the leverage that copies for free. ... If you want to stop renting your life and start building real assets, follow The Leverage Stack. One AI tool, every weekday.
caption: The rich don't use their own money, time, or audience. They use leverage: resources they don't own. Labor borrows other people's time, capital borrows their money, but media and code changed everything. Media borrows attention and costs nothing to copy; code borrows a machine that runs while you sleep. Neither needs permission. #aitools #passiveincome #financialfreedom #theleveragestack #wealthbuilding #sidehustle #aiautomation #buildingwealth
